description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, industrial design, featuring a matte gray finish. The front side displays a single wide drawer at the top, equipped with a horizontal bar handle, and two cabinet doors below, each with a smaller horizontal handle. The sides and back are plain, bordered by a slightly raised frame, and the top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a powder-coated finish for durability and a sleek appearance. The handles are metallic, possibly aluminum or stainless steel, and the doors and drawer suggest internal compartments for document storage. This type of cabinet is commonly found in office, garage, or workshop environments for secure and organized storage.
description: A sturdy, gray metal filing cabinet with a wide top drawer and two lower doors, featuring bar handles and a flat, durable surface. Its modern, industrial look is ideal for office or garage storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide top drawer with a bar handle and two lower cabinet doors with smaller handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, framed panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a large, unadorned panel framed by a border, with no interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring a plain, framed panel without handles or openings.
